'''Noah Stephens''' (born 3 October 2004) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]] in the [[Super League]].

==Club career==
Stephens played for local community side Pilkington Recs before being spotted by St Helens. Stephens then went on to play for St Helens academy side. In round 11 of the [[2024 Super League season]], Stephens made his club debut for St Helens in their 60-4 victory over [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]]. On 4 February 2025, Stephens signed a four-year contract extension keeping him at St Helens until the end of 2028.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cvgmedzzvnpo|title=Prop Stephens extends St Helens contract|website=www.bbc.co.uk}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.sthelensstar.co.uk/sport/25240624.noah-stephens-takes-saints-opportunity-salford/|title=Noah Stephens takes his Saints opportunity against Salford|website=www.sthelensstar.co.uk}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.saintsrlfc.com/teams/first-team/noah-stephens/|title=A big, young bulldozing forward|website=www.saintsrlfc.com}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.totalrl.com/st-helens-tie-down-noah-stephens-to-multi-year-deal/|title=St Helens tie down Noah Stephens to multi-year deal|website=www.totalrl.com}}</ref>
